titleEn: Upcoming AI Training Course Aims to Help Onboard Floral Employees Faster
titleZh: 花卉行业AI培训课程：用NotebookLM加速新员工入职
summaryZh: 美国花卉协会（SAF）推出在线课程“NotebookLM for Florists”，教花卉企业利用谷歌NotebookLM将现有员工手册、标准操作流程等文档转化为AI驱动的培训系统。课程涵盖创建可搜索知识库、定制音频培训播客等，帮助员工独立查找答案，减少管理者重复解答问题的时间。参与者表示，多格式信息访问提升了员工自信和责任感。课程现已通过SAF花卉教育中心开放。
translationZh:
美国花卉协会（SAF）推出了一门在线课程，旨在帮助花卉企业利用人工智能简化员工培训、改善入职流程，并减少管理者花在回答重复性问题上的时间。

“NotebookLM for Florists：打造你的店铺AI培训助手”课程教授花卉专业人士如何使用谷歌的NotebookLM，将现有的员工手册、标准操作流程及其他业务文档转化为AI驱动的培训系统。课程向参与者展示如何创建可搜索的知识库、定制化的音频培训播客以及其他资源，帮助员工独立找到答案。

“这项技术本身可能看起来令人生畏，但不必如此，”SAF信息技术总监兼课程讲师Joe Aldeguer表示，“这门课程将流程一步步分解，让任何人都能利用已有的文档构建一个强大的培训系统。你不需要成为AI专家，你只需要了解自己的业务。”

知识库建成后，员工可以提问诸如“我们的替换政策是什么？”或“如何处理延迟交货？”等问题，并根据企业自身的流程获得答案，从而减少干扰并确保培训的一致性。

NotebookLM还可以生成针对特定角色的音频培训播客，为员工提供另一种学习公司流程和记忆信息的方式。

来自圣地亚哥Four Seasons Flowers & Plants的店主、AAF成员Carma White参与了该课程的试点项目，并在过去一年中一直在她的店铺中使用NotebookLM知识库。她表示，以多种形式为员工提供信息使他们更加自信和负责。

“这些信息既存在于他们阅读过的内容中，也存在于他们听过的内容中，”White说，“他们不能说‘我不知道’。”

据SAF教育总监、AAF成员Kate Delaney称，有效的员工培训仍然是花卉企业面临的最大挑战之一。

“培训是店主最大的投入之一，尤其是在招聘季节性员工或同时入职多名员工时，”Delaney说，“这门课程帮助企业创建一个更易于交付、对员工更具吸引力、且远比依赖跟岗或指望有人记住解释所有事情要一致得多的培训系统。”

除了构建AI驱动的培训助手外，该课程还涵盖了组织业务信息、管理员工访问权限、保护公司数据以及在流程演变时维护知识库的最佳实践。

“NotebookLM for Florists：打造你的店铺AI培训助手”现已通过SAF花卉教育中心开放。
featuredReason: 该新闻聚焦花卉行业利用AI工具（NotebookLM）解决员工培训这一普遍痛点，内容新颖且实操性强，对智慧畜牧行业有直接借鉴意义——同样面临季节性用工、培训一致性差等问题。课程提供从文档到知识库的完整方法论，可迁移至畜牧企业培训场景，具有跨行业启发价值。
contentFull:
By Society of American Florists|July 21, 2026 

 

 

 

 The Society of American Florists (SAF) has launched an online course designed to help floral businesses use artificial intelligence to streamline employee training, improve onboarding, and reduce the time managers spend answering repetitive questions.

 NotebookLM for Florists: Build Your Shop’s AI Training Assistant teaches floral professionals how to use Google’s NotebookLM to transform existing employee handbooks, standard operating procedures, and other business documents into an AI-powered training system. The course shows participants how to create a searchable knowledge base, customized audio training podcasts, and other resources that help employees find answers independently.

 “The technology itself can seem intimidating, but it doesn’t have to be,” says Joe Aldeguer, SAF’s IT Director and Course Instructor. “This course breaks the process down step by step so anyone can build a powerful training system using the documents they already have. You don’t need to be an AI expert; you just need to know your business.”

 Once built, the knowledge database allows employees to ask questions such as, “What is our substitution policy?” or “How do we handle late deliveries?” and receive answers based on the business’s own procedures, reducing interruptions and helping ensure consistent training.

 NotebookLM can also generate role-specific audio training podcasts, giving employees another way to learn company procedures and retain information.

 The Heuchera Fyre Wing Series from Terra Nova Takes Flight

 

 

 Carma White, AAF, owner of Four Seasons Flowers & Plants in San Diego, participated in a pilot program for the course and has been using the NotebookLM knowledge base in her shop for the past year. She says giving employees access to information in multiple formats has made them more confident and accountable.

 “It’s there in what they’ve read and what they’ve heard,” says White. “They can’t say, ‘I didn’t know that.'”

 According to Kate Delaney, AAF, SAF’s Director of Education, effective employee training remains one of the biggest challenges facing floral businesses.

 “Training is one of the biggest investments shop owners make, especially when hiring seasonal staff or onboarding multiple employees at once,” says Delaney. “This course helps businesses create a training system that’s easier to deliver, more engaging for employees and far more consistent than relying on shadowing or someone remembering to explain everything.”

 In addition to building an AI-powered training assistant, the course covers best practices for organizing business information, managing employee access, protecting company data and maintaining the knowledge base as procedures evolve.

 NotebookLM for Florists: Build Your Shop’s AI Training Assistant is available now through SAF’s Floral Education Hub.

 

 1 1 5 Upcoming AI Training Course Aims to Help Onboard Floral Employees Faster

 The Society of American Florists is the association that connects and cultivates a thriving floral community through training, education, marketing resources, and advocacy. For more information, visit SAFNow.org. See all author stories here.
author: nmatysik
contentHtml:
With the course, the Society of American Florists hopes to streamline employee training through artificial intelligence.
The post Upcoming AI Training Course Aims to Help Onboard Floral Employees Faster appeared first on Greenhouse Grower.
